body.title: Datacenter announces capabilities to plugged-in agents — protocol shape ratified
body.text:
# D-announce-protocol-2026-05-01
**title:** Datacenter announces capabilities to plugged-in agents — protocol shape ratified
**date:** 2026-05-01
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-datacenter-capability-announce-protocol (parent), T-comms-device-router-mismatch, T-comms-lineage-alias-removal, slice1-children TBD

## Decision narrative
Akien reviewed Opus's announce-protocol design doc (lab/design_docs/announce-protocol-design-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md) and ratified all 11 open questions in § 14. Headline decisions:

1. Profile (static YAML, runtime dir) and Manifest (dynamic, derived) are sharply distinct
2. Single transport: IMAP envelopes on existing bus; surface adapters at each end
3. Suffix-style addresses (`comms://cc.0.console`) — zero router-change
4. Lineage form aliasing **NOT shipped** — accelerated deprecation per E-decision (single user, research project, "if it breaks we fix it")
5. Re-announce is push-on-change via `comms://announce-events` channel
6. Igor's system prompt gains BOUND CAPABILITIES layer with manifest etag in cache key
7. CC plugs in via new MCP server (`UnseenUniversity/devices/claude/announce_mcp.py`)
8. Trust model unchanged: localhost-uid trust
9. `channel.py` becomes thin shim; sweep is child ticket
10. `cc_queue.py` orthogonal — tickets are state, not capabilities
11. Profile inheritance shipped in v1 (deep-merge with __replace__ marker)
12. Bootstrap minimum lives in the per-agent shim (not a separate `bootstrap.json`)
13. Read-and-remove inbox pattern; IMAP becomes pure delivery transport
14. Manifest persists with `stale_after_s ~5min` on agent side
15. Profiles: repo canonical (`UnseenUniversity/config/profiles/`), runtime read (`~/.unseen_university/profiles/`)
16. CC palace permissions: `read_write` (Akien: "you're his doctor")
17. Cross-cutting: SQLite-removal has 3 outstanding tickets — separate decision cycle (resolved later as D-reorg-execute-2026-05-01)

This decision spans multiple slices. Slice 1 = round-trip vertical (envelope + profile + manifest + broker + igor profile + round-trip test). Subsequent slices add skeleton integration, live invalidation, agent-side clients, Igor cognition wiring, and cleanup.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-03T02:07:39.422321+00:00
**Ticket count:** 25 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-announce-slice1-envelope (S) — announce/envelope.py — IdentityEnvelope dataclass  `done` — IdentityEnvelope dataclass at announce/envelope.py. Mandatory fields validated on from_dict(); suffix-style address helpers (primary_mailbox, surface_mailbox, coa_mailbox); for_this_process() convenie
- T-announce-slice1-manifest-dataclasses (S) — announce/manifest.py — Manifest + ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL dataclasses  `done` — Manifest + ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL dataclasses at announce/manifest.py. etag() SHA-256 helper for cache-invalidation. UnseenUniversity commit a3caa2d.
- T-announce-slice1-profile-loader (S) — announce/profile.py — load_profile (no inheritance, no lineage alias)  `done` — load_profile(agent_id, profiles_dir) at announce/profile.py; no inheritance, no lineage alias (E-decision). ProfileNotFoundError/ProfileValidationError. profile_yaml_etag(). Commits: UnseenUniversity 
- T-comms-lineage-alias-removal (S) — Remove lineage alias from announce-protocol v1 ship  `done` — Closed as side effect of profile.py slice 1. Profile shipped with zero lineage alias per E-decision. Design doc § 8.A updated to reflect this (TheIgors 32eccac7). No aliases.json, no router patch — li
- T-announce-slice1-igor-profile-yaml (S) — config/profiles/igor.yaml — minimal viable profile for round-trip test  `done` — Canonical igor.yaml at config/profiles/igor.yaml. Validated against profile loader. UnseenUniversity commit 6f3867a.
- T-announce-slice1-broker-in-memory (M) — announce/broker.py — AnnounceBroker + ManifestAssembler (in-memory, no IDLE)  `done` — AnnounceBroker + ManifestAssembler at announce/broker.py. resolve_announce(envelope)→Manifest. Filters registry to online+allowed; builds ToolBinding/ChannelSubscription/StateRef/ACL from profile. age
- T-announce-slice1-round-trip-test (M) — tests/test_announce_round_trip.py — proves slice 1 ships  `done` — 15/15 green. Full suite 129 passed. envelope→broker→profile→manifest round-trip, online-device filtering, error paths. UnseenUniversity commit ff711ba.
- T-comms-device-router-mismatch (M) — IgorDevice.comms() advertises address that router cannot resolve  `done` — Closed as side effect of T-announce-slice2-suffix-comms-routing — router now peels suffix variants so IgorDevice.comms() addresses resolve cleanly. UnseenUniversity commit 0ed4a75.
- T-announce-slice2-suffix-comms-routing (M) — Migrate slash-style comms:// addresses to suffix-style + router resolves dot-separated suffixes  `done` — Router.resolve() peels suffix-style addresses (longest-prefix-wins). Router.extract_surface() exposes the qualifier. skeleton/stub migrated from slash-style. 5 new tests; 134 passed. Closes T-comms-de
- T-announce-slice2-broker-as-skeleton-subdevice (L) — Register AnnounceBroker as Skeleton sub-device + bootstrap announce/announce-events mailboxes + IMAP listener  `done` — Skeleton bootstraps announce + announce-events mailboxes, registers AnnounceBroker, runs AnnounceListener.pump() to dispatch envelopes→manifests over IMAP. Errors publish structured kind=error. listen
- T-announce-slice2-integration-test (M) — End-to-end IMAP-stub integration test: agent envelope → manifest round-trip  `done` — Slice 2 green-test ships: end-to-end Skeleton+IMAP-stub round-trip verifies envelope→manifest path with suffix-style surface addresses; malformed-envelope branch verifies error-mode contract. 146 pass
- T-announce-slice2-research-orca-profile-yaml (S) — Add config/profiles/research-orca.yaml — example research-agent profile  `done` — config/profiles/research-orca.yaml shipped: narrow research agent (inference+browser_use, shared channel, no mcp). Broker test verifies postgres excluded even when online. UnseenUniversity commit 65aa
- T-announce-slice2-cc-profile-yaml (S) — Add config/profiles/cc.yaml — CC agent profile  `done` — config/profiles/cc.yaml shipped: stateless CC profile (inference+browser_use+swadl, no postgres/discord, narrow inbound ACL, mcp surface). Test coverage in test_announce_round_trip.py. agent_datacente
- T-announce-slice3-datacenter-client (M) — Generic DatacenterClient — agent-side announce + manifest cache + accessors  `done` — DatacenterClient ships: announce() with bounded poll, manifest cache, accessor methods (get_tool/get_tools/get_state_ref/get_state_refs/get_channels/get_acl/get_surface_address/get_primary_address). A
- T-announce-slice3-client-integration-test (M) — End-to-end integration: DatacenterClient + Skeleton round-trip via IMAP stub  `done` — Slice 3 green-test ships: 3 end-to-end cases (Igor round-trip, unknown agent rejected, CC profile round-trip) verify DatacenterClient↔Skeleton over IMAP stub. Background pumper drives skeleton.announc
- T-announce-slice4-igor-boot-datacenter-client (M) — Igor.__init__ wires DatacenterClient with graceful no-datacenter fallback  `done` — Igor.__init__ wires DatacenterClient at end of __init__ (after _push_state_inventory). Build-to-intent: always tries to connect; absence is failure mode. Graceful fallback on any error. self.datacente
- T-announce-slice4-system-prompt-capability-layer (M) — system_prompt — optional CAPABILITIES section from manifest + etag in cache key  `done` — build_system_prompt accepts optional datacenter_client; manifest profile_etag folded into cache key; CAPABILITIES section prepended for interactive prompts (≤200 chars per line). Existing callers see 
- T-announce-slice5-profile-inheritance (M) — profile.py — deep-merge inheritance with __replace__ marker (slice 5)  `done` — Profile inheritance shipped: load_profile resolves inherits chains; deep-merge dicts; lists child-replace; __replace__ sentinel for explicit override; cycle detection. 11 new tests. UnseenUniversity 1
- T-announce-slice3b-igorshim (M) — IgorShim — BaseShim subclass with install/connect/capability-reading (G-decision § 14)  `done` — IgorShim ships per G-decision § 14: install (idempotent) + connect (announces, raises ConnectionError on timeout) + capability-reading forwarders. BaseShim contract (device_id, start/stop/restart, sel
- T-announce-slice3b-invalidator (M) — Polling-based invalidator — publishes kind=invalidate to announce-events on profile change  `done` — Polling-based Invalidator ships: snapshots profile etags + registry etag, diffs on pump_once(), publishes kind=invalidate to announce-events. Background thread driven by stop event. Skipped inotify (p
- T-announce-slice3b-client-invalidate-handling (M) — DatacenterClient — check_for_invalidate() + re-announce on match  `done` — DatacenterClient.check_for_invalidate ships + architectural fix: separate comms://invalidate mailbox so manifests and invalidates don't race in announce()'s poll loop. Coalesces N matched invalidates 
- T-announce-slice3b-idle-loop (M) — AnnounceIdleLoop — IMAP IDLE-driven push wakeup wrapping announce_pump  `done` — AnnounceIdleLoop ships: IMAP IDLE daemon thread runs callback on EXISTS, startup-catchup pump, clean stop via direct sock.shutdown. Bonus: stub IDLE handler now exits cleanly on peer disconnect (previ
- T-announce-slice3b-cc-mcp-adapter (M) — CC-side announce_mcp.py adapter — exposes announce protocol as MCP tools  `done` — AnnounceMcpServer ships: 3 MCP-style tools (announce_tool, manifest_tool, check_for_invalidate_tool) returning JSON-friendly {ok, ...} dicts. Singleton DatacenterClient. Identity defaults from hostnam
- T-announce-slice5-mcp-wrapper-and-config (M) — datacenter_mcp.py wrapper + .mcp.json entry — wire AnnounceMcpServer into Claude Code  `done` — datacenter_mcp.py wrapper + .mcp.json entry ship: 3 MCP tools (announce/manifest/check_for_invalidate) backed by lazy AnnounceMcpServer singleton. JSON TextContent serialization. 7 wrapper tests + man
- T-announce-slice4b-tool-dispatch-via-manifest (M) — Announce-protocol slice 4b — Igor cortex tool dispatch via DatacenterClient manifest  `done` — Slice 4b shipped (commit dc0282ae). HIGH-inertia main.py + node_executor.py edits. Cortex.dc_client wired in main.py:_wire_datacenter; threaded through cursor_runtime → execute_node; MCPCALL consults
